notes: This batch contains expression candidates only; no usable faceProps are present yet.
Two files still include the square box/border and should not be used directly.
These SVGs should be treated as expression-language references to normalize onto the canonical avatar head, not as drop-in production assets.

optional_later.label: big_eyes_pleading
optional_later.notes: usable, but trends too cute/emoji-forward for main punk set

optional_later.label: flat_bored_snarl
optional_later.notes: possible second annoyed variant if needed

optional_later.label: minimal_neutral
optional_later.notes: very sparse; may be useful as a low-affect option

optional_later.label: blank_stare
optional_later.notes: wide-eyed blank expression; can work as a specialty read

optional_later.label: snarl_scribble_mouth
optional_later.notes: edgier anger variant, but mouth style is less clean

reject_or_redo.label: boxed_source
reject_or_redo.notes: contains square box/frame; not directly usable

reject_or_redo.label: boxed_blank
reject_or_redo.notes: contains square box/frame and is not a usable expression
